name: neocaptcha-motion-reconstruction
description: An unofficial motion-defined CAPTCHA study with a 30-second server-authoritative challenge lifecycle.

scripts.check: node --check server.mjs && node --check lib/security-core.mjs && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/challenge-timer.js && node --check public/index.js
scripts.test: node tests/security-core.test.mjs && node tests/challenge-timer.test.mjs && node tests/server-integration.test.mjs
